overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a rainy night in a neon-lit urban plaza. The camera smoothly circles a large golden avian statue surrounded by an octagonal reflecting pool, with palm trees and holographic advertisements visible in the background.

events.description: rain begins to fall, gradually increasing in intensity
moves from grassy terrain onto paved walkway surrounding the statue base

agents.ego_description: smoothly gliding forward through the wet grass toward the illuminated golden statue

entered.detail: large metallic sculpture of a bird with outstretched wings on a tiered white pedestal
tall palm trees surrounding the plaza perimeter
tall cyberpunk buildings with illuminated advertisements and holographic displays
geometric reflecting pool with white border surrounding the statue base

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in a grassy urban plaza, approaching a massive golden avian statue. The camera moves steadily forward as rain begins to fall, transitioning from grass to paved walkway around the statue's octagonal reflecting pool, with neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: monument base with octagonal reflecting pool

events.description: begins circling the statue base in a clockwise direction
passes through the shadow of the statue's wings, reducing direct illumination

agents.ego_description: circling the base of the statue at ground level, examining the octagonal pool and its contents

entered.detail: scattered metallic debris and wreckage floating in the pool water
ground-level spotlights illuminating the statue from below with warm light

segments.scene_description: The camera circles the statue's base at ground level, revealing debris floating in the octagonal pool and ground spotlights illuminating the structure. The rain intensifies as the camera moves through the statue's shadow, with surrounding palm trees passing out of view behind the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: dramatic upward view of monumental statue against rainy night sky

events.description: camera tilts upward and begins ascending to view the statue from below
bright moon becomes visible through the rain above the statue's head

agents.ego_description: rising upward and tilting the camera to gaze up at the towering statue against the rainy night sky

entered.detail: intricate metallic feathers and geometric patterns on the statue's outstretched wings
large circular holographic advertisement with pink neon glow on distant building
bright full moon visible through the rain clouds above the statue

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends and tilts upward, leaving the pool behind to focus on the statue's intricate wing details against the rainy sky. A bright moon appears through the clouds above the statue's head, while a pink holographic billboard glows on a distant building to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial circling of monumental statue with city backdrop

events.description: begins descending while continuing to circle the statue
passes back into the shadow of the statue's wings, reducing ambient light

agents.ego_description: circling the upper portions of the statue at height before descending back toward the pool level

entered.detail: reflecting pool becoming visible again as the camera descends
distant skyscrapers with various neon signs and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The camera circles the upper statue at height, showing the full span of the wings against the city skyline, then descends back toward the pool. The octagonal pool comes back into view below as the camera moves through the statue's shadow, with palm trees reappearing on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban plaza that begins at ground level and ascends to reveal a towering golden avian statue against a neon skyline. It begins by moving steadily forward across grassy terrain and onto a paved walkway, approaching the statue's octagonal reflecting pool as rain starts to fall. As the camera circles the base, it passes through the statue's shadow and reveals debris floating in the water illuminated by ground spotlights, while surrounding palm trees drift out of view. The perspective then ascends and tilts upward, leaving the pool behind to capture the intricate wing details and a bright moon breaking through the clouds, framed by a glowing pink holographic billboard in the distance. Finally, the camera circles the upper span of the wings before descending back toward the pool, passing through the shadow once more as the palm trees reappear on the left.
